ddls:
CREATE TABLE "characters" (
  "character_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each character */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the character */,
  "class" TEXT /* Class of the character (e.g., Warrior, Mage, Rogue) */,
  "level" INTEGER /* Level of the character */,
  "experience_points" INTEGER /* Experience points earned by the character */,
  "attribute_points" INTEGER /* Attribute points available for the character */,
  "health_points" INTEGER /* Health points of the character */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the character */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the character was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the character was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("character_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_characters_class FOREIGN KEY ("class") REFERENCES character_classes ("class_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_characters_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "character_attributes" (
  "attribute_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each attribute */,
  "character_id" INTEGER /* ID of the character the attribute belongs to */,
  "attribute_name" TEXT /* Name of the attribute (e.g., Strength, Intelligence, Charisma) */,
  "attribute_value" TEXT /* Value of the attribute */,
  "attribute_description" TEXT /* Description of the attribute */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("attribute_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_character_attributes_character_id FOREIGN KEY ("character_id") REFERENCES characters ("character_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "character_skills" (
  "skill_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each skill */,
  "character_id" INTEGER /* ID of the character the skill belongs to */,
  "skill_name" TEXT /* Name of the skill (e.g., Persuasion, Deception, History) */,
  "skill_value" TEXT /* Value of the skill */,
  "skill_description" TEXT /* Description of the skill */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("skill_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_character_skills_character_id FOREIGN KEY ("character_id") REFERENCES characters ("character_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "character_equipment" (
  "equipment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each equipment */,
  "character_id" INTEGER /* ID of the character the equipment belongs to */,
  "equipment_name" TEXT /* Name of the equipment (e.g., Longsword, Leather Armor, Backpack) */,
  "equipment_description" TEXT /* Description of the equipment */,
  "equipment_type" TEXT /* Type of the equipment (e.g., weapon, armor, accessory) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("equipment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_character_equipment_character_id FOREIGN KEY ("character_id") REFERENCES characters ("character_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "quests" (
  "quest_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each quest */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the quest */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the quest */,
  "reward_experience_points" INTEGER /* Experience points rewarded for completing the quest */,
  "reward_gold" INTEGER /* Gold rewarded for completing the quest */,
  "quest_difficulty" TEXT /* Difficulty level of the quest (e.g., easy, medium, hard) */,
  "quest_type" TEXT /* Type of the quest (e.g., main, side, bonus) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("quest_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "quest_objectives" (
  "objective_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each objective */,
  "quest_id" INTEGER /* ID of the quest the objective belongs to */,
  "objective_name" TEXT /* Name of the objective (e.g., Find the lost city, Retrieve the treasure) */,
  "objective_description" TEXT /* Description of the objective */,
  "objective_status" TEXT /* Status of the objective (e.g., completed, in progress, failed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("objective_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_quest_objectives_quest_id FOREIGN KEY ("quest_id") REFERENCES quests ("quest_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "character_quest_status" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each status */,
  "character_id" INTEGER /* ID of the character the status belongs to */,
  "quest_id" INTEGER /* ID of the quest the status belongs to */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the quest (e.g., in progress, completed, failed) */,
  "completion_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the quest was completed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_character_quest_status_quest_id FOREIGN KEY ("quest_id") REFERENCES quests ("quest_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_character_quest_status_character_id FOREIGN KEY ("character_id") REFERENCES characters ("character_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_mechanics" (
  "mechanic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game mechanic */,
  "mechanic_name" TEXT /* Name of the game mechanic (e.g., Attack Roll, Skill Check) */,
  "mechanic_description" TEXT /* Description of the game mechanic */,
  "mechanic_formula" TEXT /* Mathematical formula for the game mechanic */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mechanic_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "character_notes" (
  "note_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each note */,
  "character_id" INTEGER /* ID of the character the note belongs to */,
  "note_text" TEXT /* Text of the note */,
  "note_type" TEXT /* Type of the note (e.g., backstory, personality, appearance) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("note_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_character_notes_character_id FOREIGN KEY ("character_id") REFERENCES characters ("character_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., player, game master) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "character_classes" (
  "class_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each class */,
  "class_name" TEXT /* Name of the class (e.g., Warrior, Mage, Rogue) */,
  "class_description" TEXT /* Description of the class */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("class_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "character_class_attributes" (
  "class_attribute_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each class attribute */,
  "class_id" INTEGER /* ID of the class the attribute belongs to */,
  "attribute_name" TEXT /* Name of the attribute (e.g., Strength, Intelligence, Charisma) */,
  "attribute_value" TEXT /* Value of the attribute */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("class_attribute_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_character_class_attributes_class_id FOREIGN KEY ("class_id") REFERENCES character_classes ("class_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "character_class_skills" (
  "class_skill_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each class skill */,
  "class_id" INTEGER /* ID of the class the skill belongs to */,
  "skill_name" TEXT /* Name of the skill (e.g., Persuasion, Deception, History) */,
  "skill_value" TEXT /* Value of the skill */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("class_skill_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_character_class_skills_class_id FOREIGN KEY ("class_id") REFERENCES character_classes ("class_id")
)
